use_cases: Interactive portfolio landing pages with crystalline visual effects
Creative agency hero sections featuring cursor-driven animations
Artistic tool interfaces showcasing particle effects
Minimalist dark-themed websites with premium cursor interactions
Digital art installations requiring ambient visual feedback
ai_summary: A cursor-based particle animation component that renders crystalline line patterns using HTML5 canvas. Creates glass-like translucent crystals that grow from the cursor position with shatter effects on click. Uses HSL color values for ethereal blue-tinted glass aesthetics with smooth 60fps animations through requestAnimationFrame.
